generation_model.name: gpt-oss-120b

leaderboard_details.lmarena_basis: Overall rank on https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard for gpt-oss-120b at run time.
leaderboard_details.artificial_analysis_basis: Highest Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index among the feasible open-weight shortlist considered in Phase 1.

selection_rationale: Qwen3-235B-A22B and DeepSeek V3.2 exceed the machine's practical unified-memory budget.
gpt-oss-120b is the only preferred MoE candidate that both fits and has GGUF availability.
MoE is preferred on this 273 GB/s-class bandwidth-limited system because only active parameters dominate inference bandwidth.

embedding_model.name: BAAI/bge-large-en-v1.5
embedding_model.selection_rationale: Best retrieval-rank among preferred embedding candidates that comfortably fits residual memory.

notes: Artificial Analysis ranks were resolved via live model-page intelligence scores because the public page exposes scores more reliably than a stable ordinal API.
MTEB retrieval ranks were scraped live from the Hugging Face MTEB leaderboard space.
Phase 1 stops here pending human approval before any Phase 2 downloads or benchmarking.
